productDisplayName: Puma Men Volt White Sports Shoes
description: A white Sports shoe designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort, the puma Volt has excellent features to make sure your feet perform at their best.  The great look means it's not just for sports &ndash you can team it with jeans and t-shirts to add style to a casual outfit.UpperSynthetic mesh upper for breathability, with leather-look overlays for durabilityFabric lining for sweat-free comfortReflective details for high-visibility at nightLacing system for a snug, customised FitCushioned tongue, collar and footbed for all-day comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticpuma cat logo printed on the toe box, tongue, back foot and side of outsoleMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with hexagonal lugs on the medial forefoot and textured lugs on the lateral forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementCurved midfoot for inner arch supportShoe careWipe surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
